message.content:
@startuml
!theme plain

class "A Iterable" {
  __iter__
}

class "A Reversible" {
  __reversed__
}

class "A Sized" {
  __len__
}

class "A Container" {
  __contains__
}

class "A Collection" {
  __contains__
  __iter__
  __len__
}

class "A Sequence" {
  __getitem__
  __len__
  __contains__
  __iter__
  __reversed__
  index
  count
}

class "A MutableSequence" {
  __getitem__
  __setitem__
  __delitem__
  __len__
  insert
  __contains__
  __iter__
  __reversed__
  index
  count
  append
  reverse
  extend
  pop
  remove
  __iadd__
}

"Reversible" --|> "Iterable"
"Sized" --|> "Collection"
"Container" --|> "Collection"
"Collection" --|> "Iterable"
"Sequence" --|> "Reversible"
"Sequence" --|> "Sized"
"Sequence" --|> "Container"
"MutableSequence" --|> "Sequence"

@enduml
